ddls:
CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Data type returned by the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function's purpose */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example of how the function can be used */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the function is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function used */,
  "original_value" TEXT /* Original value before formatting */,
  "formatted_value" TEXT /* Formatted value after transformation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the function */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the function execution was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the format */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the format applies to */,
  "format_string" TEXT /* Format string used for conversion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format's purpose */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the format is a default format */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the format was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., DATE, INTEGER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_numeric" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data type is numeric */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format that was changed */,
  "old_format_string" TEXT /* Previous format string before change */,
  "new_format_string" TEXT /* New format string after change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formats_history_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function that caused the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who encountered the error */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is currently active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the role permissions were modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formatting_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function requested */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Input value to be formatted */,
  "requested_format" TEXT /* Requested format string */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time when the request was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formatting_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
